name: Gerrod the Elder Warrior
description:
Gerrod the Elder Warrior, Immortal Knight of Land’s End

Author’s Notes: We love Gerrod the goat. He’s a pretty fun boss, just fought him so feel like it’s worth making him. Plus, once again no Ender Lilies bots, so I’ll do it myself. Probably no alternate versions for this guy though.
creator: Mallard Man
